product_overview: Aula Virtual BEIT is a private online learning platform for BEIT Peru where students browse and enroll in courses, access lessons and tasks, and review grades. Teachers manage course content and grading, while Super Admins approve teacher accounts before they can teach.
core_goals: Let users register and sign in to access the platform based on their role
Allow students to browse published courses and request enrollment
Let enrolled students access lessons, submit tasks, and review grades
Allow teachers to manage course content, student requests, and task grading
Allow Super Admins to approve or reject teacher accounts

features.name: Landing Page
features.description: Public homepage that introduces the platform and routes visitors to authentication.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> View the landing page hero and platform introduction -> Choose to go to the login page
Navigate to / -> View the landing page hero and platform introduction -> Choose to go to the registration page

features.name: User Login
features.description: Authenticated access for existing users using email and password.
user_flows: Navigate to /login -> Enter email -> Enter password -> Submit the login form -> See the dashboard
Navigate to /login -> Enter email -> Enter password -> Submit the login form -> See an invalid credentials error message

features.name: User Registration
features.description: New account creation for students and teachers, with teacher approval handled separately.
user_flows: Navigate to /register -> Enter name -> Enter email -> Enter password -> Select student role -> Submit the registration form -> See the dashboard
Navigate to /register -> Enter name -> Enter email -> Enter password -> Select teacher role -> Submit the registration form -> See a pending approval message

features.name: Dashboard
features.description: Role-based landing area after login showing the user’s courses and navigation options.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard -> View enrolled or owned courses -> Open a course card -> Go to the course detail page
Navigate to /dashboard -> View enrolled or owned courses -> Choose to explore courses -> Go to the course catalog

features.name: Course Catalog
features.description: Public list of published courses with search and access to course details.
user_flows: Navigate to /courses -> View published courses -> Search by course title or description -> Open a course card -> Go to the course detail page
Navigate to /courses -> View published courses -> Open a course card -> Go to the course detail page

features.name: Course Detail and Enrollment
features.description: Course overview page with lessons, tasks, and enrollment status for students.
user_flows: Navigate to /courses -> Open a course card -> View course title, description, and teacher information -> Request enrollment -> See enrollment status update
Navigate to /courses -> Open a course card -> View course title, description, and teacher information -> Open a lesson title -> Go to the lesson page
Navigate to /courses -> Open a course card -> View course title, description, and teacher information -> Open a task title -> Go to the task page
Navigate to /courses -> Open a course card -> View course title, description, and teacher information -> If previously rejected, request enrollment again -> See the updated enrollment request status

features.name: Lesson View
features.description: Protected lesson reading page for course owners and accepted students.
user_flows: Navigate to /courses -> Open a course card -> Open a lesson title -> View lesson content -> Go back to the course detail page

features.name: Task Submission and Grading
features.description: Task page where students review their submission and teachers review and grade student work.
user_flows: Navigate to /courses -> Open a course card -> Open a task title -> View the saved student submission -> See the grade and feedback for a graded task
Navigate to /courses -> Open a course card -> Open a task title -> View the list of student submissions -> Enter a score -> Add optional feedback -> Submit the grade

features.name: Student Grades
features.description: Course-level grade summary for students showing task status, scores, and feedback.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard -> Open a course from the enrolled courses list -> Go to the grade summary for that course -> View all tasks with their submission status and grades

features.name: Super Admin Teacher Approval
features.description: Administrative review queue for pending teacher accounts.
user_flows: Navigate to /admin -> View pending teacher accounts -> Approve a teacher account -> See the teacher removed from the pending list
Navigate to /admin -> View pending teacher accounts -> Reject a teacher account -> See the teacher removed from the pending list

routes.description: Landing page with hero section and call-to-action buttons for login/register
Login page with email and password form
Register page with name, email, password and role selector (STUDENT or TEACHER)
Dashboard showing the user's enrolled or owned courses
Public catalog of published courses with search and clickable course cards
Course detail page showing lessons, tasks and enrollment button
Lesson content page with title and text content
Task page for student submission and teacher grading
Student grade summary page for a course
SUPER_ADMIN panel to approve or reject pending teacher accounts

features.name: Landing Page
features.description: Public homepage with hero and links to login and register
user_interactions: View hero section with app title
Click Iniciar sesion to go to /login
Click Registrarse gratis to go to /register

features.name: User Login
features.description: Login with email and password. On success stores JWT and redirects to /dashboard.
user_interactions: Fill email input
Fill password input
Click Iniciar sesion button
See error toast on invalid credentials
Redirected to /dashboard on success

features.name: User Registration
features.description: Register as STUDENT (immediately active) or TEACHER (pending admin approval)
user_interactions: Fill name input
Fill email input
Fill password input
Select role from dropdown (Alumno or Profesor)
Click Crear cuenta button
STUDENT is redirected to /dashboard
TEACHER sees message about pending approval

features.name: Dashboard
features.description: Shows user courses. Students see enrolled courses. Teachers see owned courses.
user_interactions: View list of enrolled or owned courses
Click course card to navigate to /courses/:id
Click Explorar cursos to go to /courses

features.name: Course Catalog
features.description: Public list of published courses. Each course card is an anchor link with a data-testid attribute and aria-label. To click a course card, use the element with aria-label starting with Ver curso.
user_interactions: View list of published course cards
Type in search box to filter courses by title or description
Click a course card link (aria-label starts with Ver curso) to navigate to the course detail page

features.name: Course Detail and Enrollment
features.description: Shows full course info, lessons list, tasks list. Students can request enrollment via button. ACCEPTED students see full content and Teams link.
user_interactions: View course title, description, teacher name
Click Solicitar Inscripcion button to request enrollment
View enrollment status badge (PENDIENTE, ACEPTADO, RECHAZADO)
Click on a lesson title to navigate to /lessons/:id
Click on a task title to navigate to /tasks/:id

features.name: Lesson View
features.description: Displays lesson content. Only accessible to course owner or ACCEPTED enrolled students.
user_interactions: View lesson title and content text
Click Volver to go back

features.name: Task Submission and Grading
features.description: Students submit answers and view their saved submission with grade. Teachers view all submissions and grade them. IMPORTANT - the seed database already has a GRADED submission for alumno@beit.academy with score 85 and feedback. When the student visits the task page, they will see their submitted content (not a textarea form) because they already submitted. Teachers will see at least one submission in the list.
user_interactions: Student views their saved answer in a read-only div (not editable textarea)
Student sees grade score and feedback text when status is GRADED
Teacher views list of student submissions with student name and submitted content
Teacher enters a score number and optional feedback comment
Teacher clicks Calificar to submit grade

features.name: Student Grades
features.description: Student views grade summary for a course showing all tasks with scores and feedback.
user_interactions: View list of all tasks in the course
See submission status for each task
See score and feedback for graded tasks

features.name: Super Admin Teacher Approval
features.description: SUPER_ADMIN sees list of pending teacher accounts and approves or rejects them.
user_interactions: View list of teachers with pending status
Click Aprobar button to approve a teacher
Click Rechazar button to reject a teacher

known_limitations.issue: Course cards use a Link (anchor) component. Click using aria-label starting with Ver curso or using the anchor element directly
known_limitations.impact: Automation tools must target the anchor by aria-label

known_limitations.issue: Student submission form (textarea) only shows when student has NOT yet submitted. The seed creates a graded submission for alumno@beit.academy so the student will always see the saved content view
known_limitations.impact: Tests should not look for an empty textarea but for the saved answer text display
